Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Westbound Reroute near Chicago/Laramie
ShortDescription: Westbound 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Laramie, Augusta, Central and Chicago: due to, street blockage near Chicago.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line Delays
ShortDescription: Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line trains are running with residual delays near Belmont. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem near Belmont.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
